mapper.select: SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM address WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail}, is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId}
